title: Blood Refining Technique
content:
The 
Blood Refining Technique
 is a powerful technique used to refine weapons to make them your own.

Uses
[
]

The technique is considerably more effective than refining on one's own as shown when 
Wang Lin
 used it to refine a 
Core Formation

Treasure
 that was infinitely close to 
Nascent Soul
 under the guidance of 
Situ Nan
. However it comes with a few drawbacks. The user will feel much more significant levels of harm whenever the weapon is damaged and furthermore the weapon will forever release a blood-like smell, which will only get worse as it claims more lives.
